summary: Frontend re-test of ChatBot fix PASSED. Floating toggle button is now positioned at bottom-LEFT (x=24, y=1000) with data-testid='chatbot-toggle', no longer overlapping with the bottom-right 'Made with Emergent' badge. Clicking the toggle opens data-testid='chatbot-panel' (positioned bottom-24 left-6, 400x560px). Input (data-testid='chatbot-input') and send button (data-testid='chatbot-send') render correctly. Sending the message 'Kto jest najlepszym strzelcem?' produced a real Polish AI reply within ~10s, naming top scorers (Kuba Nowak #9, Igor Pawlak #11, Filip Kowal #7) — confirming the /api/ai/chat integration works end-to-end and the previous overlap blocker is resolved.
critical_code_review_comments: ChatBot.jsx is clean and small (~105 lines). All interactive elements have data-testid. Polish error fallback message is present. No issues.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ChatBot floating widget now sits at bottom-left (left-6 bottom-6, z-[60]). The 'Made with Emergent' badge remains at bottom-right and no longer interferes. Note: a script that counts chatbot messages via '[data-testid=chatbot-messages] > div' will include the trailing empty endRef div — use ':not(:empty)' or filter blank text when asserting reply receipt. AI replies typically arrive in 5-12s.
rca of the issue: Previous iteration: chatbot panel was at bottom-right and the 'Made with Emergent' overlay (z-index high) intercepted clicks/visibility. Fix: moved toggle and panel to left-6 with z-[60]. Verified working in this iteration.
